creator: 4721@hushmail.com
text:
file catalog.xml has been changed to add a license header, requiring a change to distinfo.

=> catalog.xml doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/vuxml.
=> Attempting to fetch http://www.vuxml.org/dtd/vuxml-1/catalog.xml
fetch: http://www.vuxml.org/dtd/vuxml-1/catalog.xml: size mismatch: expected 835, actual 2150

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
